Hero.title: Sell your photos more securely and more profitably than ever before.
Hero.description: Enterprise-grade photography platform with QR automation, AI sorting, secure galleries, GDPR compliance, and automated print fulfillment built for professional photographers in DACH.

PainPoints.title: Photography is a creative business stuck in administrative overhead.
PainPoints.subtitle: Traditional photography workflows cost you time, money, and compliance risk.
PainPoints.point1Desc: Hours spent matching faces to children, classes, and orders for every event.
PainPoints.point2Desc: Slow turnaround and clunky checkout leave 30-50% of potential orders on the table.
PainPoints.point3Desc: Public links, USB sticks and shared drives expose you to fines and reputational damage.
PainPoints.point4Desc: Screenshots, downloads and shared logins quietly destroy your print revenue.
PainPoints.point5Desc: Each event lives in a different folder, tool and inbox — nothing is connected.
PainPoints.point6Desc: You don't know which schools, classes or product mixes actually drive profit.

Steps.title: Automation meets enterprise security
Steps.subtitle: Lumiphoto eliminates manual work while ensuring GDPR compliance

Solution.title: Complete QR-based workflow automation

Solution.step1Desc: Schools pre-register students with unique QR codes
Solution.step2Desc: Scan QR code before each child is photographed
Solution.step3Desc: Photos automatically sorted to correct galleries
Solution.step4Desc: Parents receive secure access codes to their gallery

Pricing.title: Choose the perfect plan for your business
Pricing.subtitle: All plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
Pricing.starterDesc: Perfect for individual photographers starting out
Pricing.roiSubtitle: See how much you could earn with Lumiphoto
Pricing.roiDescription: That's {amount} more per year with the Pro plan
Pricing.stillHaveQuestionsSubtitle: Our team is here to help you find the right plan
Pricing.q1: Can I change plans at any time?
Pricing.a1: Yes, you can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your plan at any time. If you upgrade, the change will be applied immediately. If you downgrade or cancel, the change will take effect at the end of your billing cycle.
Pricing.q2: What happens after the free trial?
Pricing.a2: After your 14-day free trial ends, you will need to choose a paid plan to keep hosting active galleries. Your photos and settings will be saved for 30 days to give you time to decide.
Pricing.a3: Absolutely. Lumiphoto is fully GDPR-compliant by design. All customer and child photos are stored in secure, German-based data centers (ISO 27001) with end-to-end encryption.
Pricing.q4: What payment methods do you accept?
Pricing.a4: We accept all major credit cards, SEPA bank transfers, and PayPal. For corporate or studio contracts, we also support invoicing options.
Pricing.a5: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee on all subscription plans if you are not satisfied with the platform. No questions asked.
Pricing.q6: Do you offer discounts for multiple users?
Pricing.a6: Yes! For photography agencies or large studios requiring multiple photographer seats, please contact our sales team to discuss custom pricing packages.

SchoolPhotography.heroTitle: QR-based workflow automation for school photography
SchoolPhotography.heroSubtitle: From registration to purchase, everything is automated. No more manual sorting, lost photos, or GDPR headaches.
SchoolPhotography.stepsSubtitle: Four simple steps from school registration to parent purchase
SchoolPhotography.step1Desc: Schools provide student list. Lumiphoto generates unique QR codes for each child.
SchoolPhotography.step1Bullet3: Each code linked to student profile
SchoolPhotography.step2Desc: Scan QR code before photographing each child. System captures metadata automatically.
SchoolPhotography.step3Desc: Photos upload to secure cloud. AI matches images to correct student galleries.
SchoolPhotography.step4Desc: Parents receive unique access codes. View and purchase photos securely.
SchoolPhotography.why1Desc: Eliminate manual sorting and gallery creation
SchoolPhotography.why2Desc: Higher conversion rates with easier purchase flow
SchoolPhotography.why4Desc: Parents access photos within hours of the shoot
SchoolPhotography.qrSheetsDesc: Lumiphoto automatically generates printable QR code sheets for each student. Schools distribute them before photo day.
